name: Proteus Brutus FS

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B446FF45-EAE0-4502-B68E-948189282ED2

comment: The PROTEUS BRUTUS FS is an extremely bright IP66 rated LED Follow Spot fixture offering high intensity and excellent color quality at long distances. Operated manually with removable handles or remotely through one of the many automated remote tracking systems in the market, this purpose build fixture is ideal for any indoor and outdoor application that requires precise and smooth operation, flexible color control and superior output in medium to long throw follow spot applications.
